code: import React from'react';import TabPage from'../../components/common/TabPage';import{FiUserCheck,FiBriefcase,FiUsers}from'react-icons/fi';import RecruitmentVacancies from'./RecruitmentVacancies';import RecruitmentCandidates from'./RecruitmentCandidates';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const tabs=[{key:'vacancies',label:'Vacancies',icon:FiBriefcase,component:RecruitmentVacancies},{key:'candidates',label:'Candidates',icon:FiUsers,component:RecruitmentCandidates}];const RecruitmentPage=()=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(TabPage,{tabs:tabs,defaultTab:"vacancies",moduleIcon:FiUserCheck,moduleTitle:"Recruitment"});export default RecruitmentPage;
